title: Possible to set/change a column's relative position via API?
excerpt: Hi there, I’m trying to create new columns relative to particular existing columns on the board, but it doesn’t appear at first glance that there is a position property to set on the existing mutations. In light of the r…

posts.author: Tim.Hunt (Tim Hunt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there, I’m trying to create new columns relative to particular existing columns on the board, but it doesn’t appear at first glance that there is a position property to set on the existing mutations. In light of the recent updates to the group’s position arguments (relative to, position relative method), I think it would make sense to apply a similar approach to be able to create columns at a position relative to another given column.

Is this type of functionality currently possible with the API? If not, should I create a separate feature request post for this?

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Tim.Hunt,

Thanks for raising this request! I’ll pass this feedback along to my team for their consideration, as this is currently not possible.
